name: Blockbench MCP Plugin
what_it_does: Blockbench MCP plugin enabling AI agents to interact with Blockbench — the popular free 3D modeling editor for Minecraft and voxel game assets — creating and modifying 3D models, managing textures and UV maps, exporting models in various game formats (Bedrock, Java, OBJ), and integrating AI-driven 3D asset creation into Minecraft modding and game development workflows.
use_cases: Generating Minecraft Bedrock/Java Edition entity models from design descriptions from game dev agents
Modifying block and item model textures from Minecraft content agents
Creating custom mob models with animations from Minecraft modding agents
Automating repetitive 3D modeling tasks from game asset pipeline agents
Building AI-assisted voxel art from creative coding agents
Exporting optimized game assets for Minecraft resource packs from packaging agents
not_for: High-fidelity 3D modeling (Blockbench is for game-optimized low-poly/voxel models)
Non-Minecraft games (though Blockbench supports other formats)
Teams using Blender, Maya, or professional 3D tools for non-game content
best_when: A Minecraft developer or content creator needs AI assistance with Blockbench 3D modeling — for entity models, block models, or resource pack creation.
avoid_when: You need professional 3D modeling for non-Minecraft/voxel content — use Blender or other professional tools.

auth.notes: No authentication — Blockbench plugin communicates locally. Blockbench must be running with the MCP plugin installed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Blockbench is free; plugin is free
pricing.notes: Blockbench and plugin are both free and open source.

performance.rate_limits: Local Blockbench process — no external rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Blockbench must be running with plugin installed — not a standalone server
Minecraft model format specifics (Bedrock vs Java) affect valid model structures
Very niche community MCP — primarily useful for Minecraft content creators
Plugin API changes with Blockbench updates — verify plugin compatibility
3D model generation via text is challenging — expect iterative refinement
Texture UV mapping automation requires understanding of Blockbench's UV editor
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local Blockbench process. No external calls. No credentials. Community MCP. Safe for Minecraft development.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local Blockbench process. No external calls. No credentials. Community MCP.
